prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(create_booking_proposal lead_component_1)
(place_inventory_hold_on_proposal lead_component_1 inventory_item_1)
(attach_confirmation_token_to_proposal lead_component_1 confirmation_token_1)
(confirm_proposal lead_component_1 confirmation_token_1)
(request_provider_hold lead_component_1 provider_endpoint_1)
(mark_deadline_slot_a_ready lead_component_1 deadline_slot_a_1 confirmation_token_1)
(register_lead_component_hold lead_component_1 deadline_slot_a_1 provider_endpoint_1)
(revoke_confirmation_token_from_proposal lead_component_1 confirmation_token_1)
(release_provider_hold lead_component_1 provider_endpoint_1)
(create_booking_proposal ancillary_component_1)
(place_inventory_hold_on_proposal ancillary_component_1 inventory_item_2)
(attach_confirmation_token_to_proposal ancillary_component_1 confirmation_token_1)
(confirm_proposal ancillary_component_1 confirmation_token_1)
(request_provider_hold ancillary_component_1 provider_endpoint_1)
(mark_deadline_slot_b_ready ancillary_component_1 deadline_slot_b_1 confirmation_token_1)
(register_ancillary_hold_with_provider ancillary_component_1 deadline_slot_b_1 provider_endpoint_1)
(assemble_reservation_record lead_component_1 ancillary_component_1 deadline_slot_a_1 deadline_slot_b_1 reservation_record_1)
(revoke_confirmation_token_from_proposal ancillary_component_1 confirmation_token_1)
(attach_confirmation_token_to_proposal lead_component_1 confirmation_token_1)
(flag_reservation_ready_for_documents reservation_record_1 lead_component_1 confirmation_token_1)
(commit_reservation_for_lead lead_component_1 reservation_record_1)
(commit_reservation_for_ancillary_component ancillary_component_1 reservation_record_1)
(bind_deadline_policy_to_proposal lead_component_1 deadline_policy_standard confirmation_token_1)
(propagate_commit_to_lead_component lead_component_1 inventory_item_1 deadline_policy_standard)
(revoke_confirmation_token_from_proposal lead_component_1 confirmation_token_1)
(attach_confirmation_token_to_proposal ancillary_component_1 confirmation_token_1)
(bind_deadline_policy_to_proposal ancillary_component_1 deadline_policy_standard confirmation_token_1)
(propagate_commit_to_ancillary_component ancillary_component_1 inventory_item_2 deadline_policy_standard)
(release_provider_hold ancillary_component_1 provider_endpoint_1)
(create_booking_proposal workflow_instance_1)
(place_inventory_hold_on_proposal workflow_instance_1 inventory_item_3)
(revoke_confirmation_token_from_proposal ancillary_component_1 confirmation_token_1)
(attach_confirmation_token_to_proposal workflow_instance_1 confirmation_token_1)
(confirm_proposal workflow_instance_1 confirmation_token_1)
(request_provider_hold workflow_instance_1 provider_endpoint_1)
(generate_fulfillment_document workflow_instance_1 fulfillment_document_template_1 reservation_record_1)
(mark_workflow_document_processed workflow_instance_1 fulfillment_document_template_1 reservation_record_1 confirmation_token_1)
(attach_supplier_confirmation_to_workflow workflow_instance_1 supplier_confirmation_token_1)
(finalize_supplier_confirmation_for_workflow workflow_instance_1 supplier_confirmation_token_1 provider_endpoint_1 fulfillment_document_template_1 reservation_record_1)
(attach_regulatory_authorization_to_workflow workflow_instance_1 regulatory_authorization_1)
(confirm_regulatory_authorization_for_workflow workflow_instance_1 regulatory_authorization_1 fulfillment_document_template_1 reservation_record_1)
(finalize_workflow_commit_to_customer workflow_instance_1)
(bind_deadline_policy_to_proposal workflow_instance_1 deadline_policy_standard confirmation_token_1)
(propagate_commit_to_workflow_instance workflow_instance_1 inventory_item_3 deadline_policy_standard)
(revoke_confirmation_token_from_proposal workflow_instance_1 confirmation_token_1)
(release_provider_hold workflow_instance_1 provider_endpoint_1)
(detach_supplier_confirmation_from_workflow workflow_instance_1 supplier_confirmation_token_1)
(detach_regulatory_authorization_from_workflow workflow_instance_1 regulatory_authorization_1)
(create_booking_proposal workflow_instance_2)
(place_inventory_hold_on_proposal workflow_instance_2 inventory_item_1)
(attach_confirmation_token_to_proposal workflow_instance_2 confirmation_token_1)
(confirm_proposal workflow_instance_2 confirmation_token_1)
(request_provider_hold workflow_instance_2 provider_endpoint_1)
(generate_fulfillment_document workflow_instance_2 fulfillment_document_template_2 reservation_record_1)
(mark_workflow_document_processed workflow_instance_2 fulfillment_document_template_2 reservation_record_1 confirmation_token_1)
(attach_supplier_confirmation_to_workflow workflow_instance_2 supplier_confirmation_token_1)
(finalize_supplier_confirmation_for_workflow workflow_instance_2 supplier_confirmation_token_1 provider_endpoint_1 fulfillment_document_template_2 reservation_record_1)
(attach_regulatory_authorization_to_workflow workflow_instance_2 regulatory_authorization_1)
(confirm_regulatory_authorization_for_workflow workflow_instance_2 regulatory_authorization_1 fulfillment_document_template_2 reservation_record_1)
(finalize_workflow_commit_to_customer workflow_instance_2)
(bind_deadline_policy_to_proposal workflow_instance_2 deadline_policy_standard confirmation_token_1)
(propagate_commit_to_workflow_instance workflow_instance_2 inventory_item_1 deadline_policy_standard)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem is complex, but I need to find a plan to achieve the goal: (booking_entity_commit_applied lead_component_1), (booking_entity_commit_applied ancillary_component_1), (booking_entity_commit_applied workflow_instance_1), and (booking_entity_commit_applied workflow_instance_2).


## Planning Goal Achievement  
- The task involves coordinating multiple components for booking entity commitments.  
- Key elements include lead_component_1, ancillary_component_1, workflow_instance_1, and workflow_instance_2.  
- Each component needs to be applied successfully to meet the booking entity's requirements.  
- The plan must ensure all parts work together seamlessly to achieve the goal.

## Examining Component Relationships  
- All components (lead_component_1, ancillary_component_1) and workflows (workflow_instance_1, workflow_instance_2) inherit from booking_proposal, which itself extends abstract_booking_category.  
- Predicates like booking_entity_open and confirmed apply to all, as they’re defined for the booking_proposal supertype.  

## Analyzing Initial State  
- Initially, no booking_proposals are open or confirmed; components and workflows exist but need processing.  
- Available resources include inventory_items, confirmation_token_1, provider_endpoint_1, and various supports like payments and pricings.  

## Mapping Commitment Process  
- To achieve commit_applied, components must first be confirmed, hold inventory, and link to deadline policies.  
- The process involves steps like bind_deadline_policy_to_proposal and finalize_workflow_commit_to_customer to reach committed_to_customer status.

## Mapping Commitment Process  
- Proposals must first be confirmed via confirm_proposal, requiring an open status, held inventory, and attached confirmation token.  
- Provider holds are established through request_provider_hold, needing a confirmed proposal and available provider endpoint, which becomes unavailable after.  

- Lead components have specific readiness actions: mark_deadline_slot_a_ready makes a slot ready if confirmed, has a slot, and has an attached token, without addons.  
- With addons, apply_addon_to_lead_component and finalize_lead_addon_assignment handle readiness, temporarily holding addons before releasing them upon completion.  

## Assembling Reservations  
- Assembling a reservation record needs hold registrations, ready slots, and available templates, with components like leads and ancillaries ready.  
- Variants like assemble_reservation_record_with_slot_a_marker allow for cases where leads aren’t ready yet, but ancillaries are, and slots have addons.  

## Processing Workflows  
- Workflows generate fulfillment documents via generate_fulfillment_document, requiring confirmed status, linked reservation records, and available document IDs.  
- Document processing involves marking_workflow_document_processed or process_payment_and_update_workflow, both needing confirmed workflows and attached tokens, with different readiness flags.  

## Finalizing Supplier Confirmations  
- Supplier confirmations attach via attach_supplier_confirmation_to_workflow, requiring confirmed workflows and available supplier confirmation tokens.  
- Finalization through finalize_supplier_confirmation_for_workflow needs processed documents, held providers, and linked records, with variations based on slot flags.

## Tracking Component Readiness  
- To commit components like leads and ancillaries, they must first be open, have inventory held, and be confirmed with attached tokens.  
- Readiness involves marking slots ready (e.g., mark_deadline_slot_a_ready for leads) and registering holds, ensuring slots and components are prepared without addons.  

- For ancillaries, readiness follows a similar process, requiring inventory holds, token attachments, and slot readiness checks.  
- Registering holds (e.g., register_lead_hold, register_anc_hold) marks components as ready, linking them to provider endpoints and slots.  

## Assembling Shared Reservations  
- Assembling reservations (e.g., assemble_reservation_record) requires both lead and ancillary components to be hold-registered and ready, with slots and templates available.  
- The process initializes reservation records, linking slots and consuming templates, allowing shared use across workflows.  

## Finalizing Commitments  
- Committing reservations (e.g., commit_reservation_for_lead) needs initialized records and ready documents, marking components as committed_to_customer.  
- Binding deadline policies to committed components (e.g., bind_deadline_policy_to_proposal) ensures they’re ready for final propagation, releasing inventory and applying commitments.

## Managing Component States  
- Components like leads and ancillaries need inventory holds, confirmation tokens, and provider endpoints to be ready for reservations.  
- Tokens and endpoints can be revoked and reattached between components, ensuring flexibility in preparation stages.  

## Handling Reservation Token Issues  
- Assembling reservations requires confirmation tokens to be attached to the lead, not ancillaries, for flagging readiness.  
- If tokens are incorrectly attached, they must be revoked from ancillaries and reattached to leads before proceeding.  

## Finalizing Reservation Commitments  
- After flagging, reservations can be committed for both lead and ancillary components, marking them as committed_to_customer.  
- Commitment doesn’t require provider endpoints to be released, maintaining holds during the process.

## Processing Workflow Documents  
- Marking workflow documents as processed (e.g., mark_workflow_document_processed) involves linking fulfillment documents to reservation records, ensuring tokens are available.  
- Effects include processed documents for workflows, enabling further steps like attaching supplier confirmations.  

## Finalizing Workflow Commitments  
- Finalizing commitments for workflows (e.g., finalize_workflow_commit_to_customer) marks them as committed, ensuring all prerequisites are met.  
- Binding deadline policies and propagating commitments release inventory, completing the workflow process.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
